title: VALUES with more tuples
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT 5 AS X WHERE 5 < 10 UNION SELECT 10 AS X WHERE 10 < 5;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 3);
SELECT NULL AS X WHERE NULL < 1 UNION SELECT 1 AS X WHERE 1 < NULL;
key_bug_features: FILTER with VALUES containing multiple tuples
